title: CS1430 - Intro to Programming
subject: Python programming for first-time programmers
strictness: Flag statements that are wrong, and oversimplifications likely to cause misconceptions later. Do not flag reasonable pedagogical simplification.
learningOutcomes: Apply the concepts of identifiers and datatypes
Program control structures such as sequential, branch, and loop
Implement modular programs using objects and functions
Understand how to use a debugger to debug errors in a program
Recognize the basic concepts of classes and objects
misconceptionTraps: Saying variables 'store' values vs. referencing objects — fine at intro level, don't flag
input() returns a string — forgetting to mention casting
